stories.title: Establish a reproducible scoring + CV harness
stories.detail: Stand up backend on :8000, run self_test, and run scripts/ralph/cv_check.py to record baseline self_test % and held-out clean-FP %. No code change to verify.py.

stories.title: t4_labour_outlier: raise recall, keep CV clean-FP < 1%
stories.detail: Improve labour-hours outlier detection (per-(name,action) generalizable signal) above the current 78.6% WITHOUT raising held-out clean FP. Verify with cv_check.py.

stories.title: t4_cost_outlier: raise recall, keep CV clean-FP < 1%
stories.detail: Improve labour-rate / cost outlier detection above 52.9% using only signals that survive 5-seed CV with ~0 held-out clean FP. Reject any rule that overfits.

stories.title: t4_origin_outlier: catch the (supplier,material) CA-rare case if generalizable
stories.detail: Investigate the one missed origin case (sup-0009/DP110). If a (supplier,material) origin signal generalizes (CV clean-FP ~0), add it; otherwise document it as inseparable and leave at 97.4%.

stories.title: Final guard: confirm no regression and document the honest ceiling
stories.detail: Re-run self_test + cv_check + golden tests. Record final numbers and the evidence that any uncaught T4 nodes are statistically identical to clean data. Emit <promise>COMPLETE</promise>.
